What is this tool?
The Gaussian Hoops Player Comparison lets you compare 2–5 NCAA players side by side. Select players to see their radar profiles, percentile rankings, and stats in one view.

Radar: Each axis shows the percentile rank (0–100) vs. players in the same position group and tier. Outer ring = 100th percentile.

Percentile bars: Side-by-side bars for each stat — longer bar = better rank among peers.

Stats table: The best value per row is highlighted in the player's color.

Share: Copy the URL to share your comparison — it includes all selected players.

📊

Compare Players

Search for at least 2 players to start the comparison.
